title: Random Forest from Scratch

parts.title: Impurity and Splitting Primitives
parts.description: Build the low-level tools a decision tree needs: measuring impurity, partitioning data on a feature threshold, and scoring candidate splits.

parts.title: Growing a Decision Tree
parts.description: Combine the primitives into a recursive tree builder with best-split selection, stopping criteria, and leaf prediction.

parts.title: Predicting with a Single Tree
parts.description: Traverse a fitted tree to predict single examples and full datasets.

parts.title: Randomness for the Ensemble
parts.description: Add bootstrap sampling of rows and random feature subsets so that individual trees become decorrelated.

parts.title: Training and Predicting with the Forest
parts.description: Grow many trees on randomized data, aggregate their votes, produce forest-level predictions, and evaluate accuracy.

title: Support Vector Machine from Scratch

parts.title: Data Preparation
parts.description: Prepare the input features so the model can train stably.

parts.title: Model Setup and Forward Pass
parts.description: Initialize parameters and compute scores and predictions from inputs.

parts.title: Loss and Objective
parts.description: Define the per-example hinge loss and the full regularized training objective.

parts.title: Gradients and Parameter Updates
parts.description: Derive gradients of the objective and apply single parameter updates.

parts.title: Training Loop
parts.description: Repeat updates over epochs to fit the model to the data.

parts.title: Prediction and Evaluation
parts.description: Use the trained model to classify new data and score its accuracy.

title: Build a Trainable CNN from Scratch in NumPy

parts.title: Softmax, Loss, and Metrics Primitives
parts.description: Build the numerically stable softmax, cross-entropy loss, and accuracy helpers used throughout the network.

parts.title: Initialization and Convolution Plumbing
parts.description: Implement He initialization, zero biases, padding, output-shape math, and the im2col / col2im transforms that power efficient convolutions.

parts.title: Layer Forward and Backward Passes
parts.description: Code the forward and backward routines for convolution, max pooling, ReLU, flatten, and linear layers.

parts.title: Fused Loss and Optimizers
parts.description: Fuse softmax with cross-entropy for stable training and implement both SGD and Adam parameter updates.

parts.title: Assembling LeNet
parts.description: Compose the layer primitives into convolutional and classifier blocks, wire up the full LeNet forward/backward pass, and add a predict helper.

parts.title: Synthetic Data Pipeline
parts.description: Generate a small synthetic image dataset and build shuffling, train/test splitting, and minibatch iteration utilities.

parts.title: Training Loop and Evaluation
parts.description: Tie everything together with a training step, epoch loop, full training driver, and a held-out evaluation routine.

title: Attention Is All You Need: Build the Transformer From Scratch

parts.title: Tokenization and Batching
parts.description: Build the vocabulary, encode and decode token ids, and pack padded sequences into batched tensors.

parts.title: Embeddings and Positional Encoding
parts.description: Scale embeddings and construct the sinusoidal positional encoding matrix added to input embeddings.

parts.title: Masks and Scaled Dot-Product Attention
parts.description: Build padding and causal masks and assemble scaled dot-product attention step by step.

parts.title: Multi-Head Attention
parts.description: Split, permute, and merge heads, project Q/K/V, and assemble the full multi-head attention module.

parts.title: Feed-Forward, LayerNorm, and Dropout
parts.description: Implement the position-wise feed-forward network, layer normalization, residual add-and-norm, and dropout primitives.

parts.title: Encoder, Decoder, and Full Model
parts.description: Stack encoder and decoder layers, tie output projections to embeddings, and run the complete forward pass.

parts.title: Parameter Initialization
parts.description: Allocate the raw weight tensors (with requires_grad) for encoder/decoder layers and embeddings, and gather them for the optimizer.

parts.title: Training Objective and Schedule
parts.description: Implement teacher forcing, Noam warmup, label-smoothed KL loss, and token-level accuracy.

parts.title: Adam Optimizer From Scratch
parts.description: Build the Adam optimizer step by step: moment buffers, exponential-moving-average updates, bias correction, the parameter update rule, and gradient zeroing.

parts.title: Training Step and Loop
parts.description: Tie everything together: run a forward pass, compute the label-smoothed loss, backpropagate, and step Adam across many iterations.

parts.title: Decoding and Beam Search
parts.description: Generate sequences with greedy argmax and a length-penalized beam search over candidate hypotheses.

title: Tiny GPT From Scratch

parts.title: Tokenizer
parts.description: Build a tiny character-level tokenizer with vocab, stoi/itos, and encode/decode helpers.

parts.title: NumPy and Softmax Foundations
parts.description: Get fluent with NumPy arrays, indexing, broadcasting, reductions, and numerically stable softmax.

parts.title: Data Pipeline and Bigram Baseline
parts.description: Load the corpus, build batched (X, Y) sequences, and train a counting-based bigram model as a baseline.

parts.title: Single-Layer Neural Bigram
parts.description: Replace the count table with a learned weight matrix and derive cross-entropy, gradients, and SGD updates.

parts.title: Layer Primitives and Backprop
parts.description: Implement forward and backward passes for linear, bias, ReLU, softmax+CE, and LayerNorm building blocks.

parts.title: Embeddings and Self-Attention
parts.description: Add token and positional embeddings, then build masked single-head and multi-head self-attention with full backward passes.

parts.title: FFN, Blocks, and Full Model
parts.description: Compose feed-forward networks, residual connections, and pre-LN Transformer blocks into the complete GPT forward/backward.

parts.title: Adam, Training Loop, and Generation
parts.description: Implement Adam, wire up the full training and validation loop, then sample text with temperature and top-k decoding.

title: Q-Learning on FrozenLake from Scratch

parts.title: Q-Table Setup
parts.description: Initialize the tabular value store and basic lookups over states and actions.

parts.title: Epsilon-Greedy Action Selection
parts.description: Implement exploration vs exploitation using random sampling and epsilon decay.

parts.title: Q-Learning Update Rule
parts.description: Compute TD targets, errors, and apply the Q-learning update to table entries.

parts.title: Training Loop
parts.description: Combine action selection, environment stepping, and updates into episodes and full training runs.

parts.title: Policy Extraction and Evaluation
parts.description: Derive a greedy policy from the trained Q-table and measure its success rate on FrozenLake.

title: AlphaZero on Connect-4 from Scratch

parts.title: Connect-4 Game Engine
parts.description: Build the board representation, move mechanics, terminal detection, and environment step function for Connect-4.

parts.title: Board Encoding and Policy-Value Network
parts.description: Encode boards as tensors and assemble a convolutional backbone with policy and value heads.

parts.title: Action Masking and Policy Sampling
parts.description: Mask illegal moves and turn network logits into sampled or greedy column actions.

parts.title: PUCT Monte Carlo Tree Search
parts.description: Implement nodes, PUCT selection, network-guided expansion, backup, and full MCTS rollouts.

parts.title: Self-Play Data Generation
parts.description: Use MCTS to play games against itself, recording (state, policy, outcome) training tuples.

parts.title: Losses and Training Loop
parts.description: Define the policy, value, and L2 losses and run minibatched training over the self-play buffer.

parts.title: Iterated Training Loop
parts.description: Alternate self-play generation and network training across many iterations.

parts.title: Agents and Evaluation
parts.description: Build baseline agents, run head-to-head matches, and measure win rate against a random policy.

title: RAG Pipeline

parts.title: Document Ingestion & Preprocessing
parts.description: Load text from files, HTML, and directories, normalize it, and wrap it into document objects with metadata.

parts.title: Chunking Strategies
parts.description: Split documents into retrievable units using fixed-size, token-based, sentence-aware, and overlapping chunkers with proper metadata.

parts.title: Embeddings & Corpus Storage
parts.description: Load a sentence-transformer model, embed and normalize chunks, and persist the corpus to disk.

parts.title: Dense Retrieval with NumPy and FAISS
parts.description: Implement cosine similarity search from scratch, then accelerate it with a FAISS index and verify the two agree.

parts.title: Prompting and Answer Generation
parts.description: Assemble grounded prompts, load a local instruct model, generate answers, and attach source citations to outputs.

parts.title: Advanced Retrieval Techniques
parts.description: Improve recall and precision with query rewriting, HyDE, BM25, hybrid search, cross-encoder reranking, MMR, and metadata filtering.

parts.title: Evaluation
parts.description: Build an eval set and implement retrieval and answer-quality metrics like hit rate, recall@k, MRR, faithfulness, and relevance.

parts.title: Robustness, Caching, and Chat Memory
parts.description: Add abstention, deduplication, embedding caching, and conversational memory with follow-up rewriting.

title: Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) from Scratch

parts.title: Log-Probability Building Blocks
parts.description: Numerically stable softmax/log-softmax, token log-prob gathering, and masked sequence log-probabilities used everywhere downstream.

parts.title: Policy Model & Sequence Log-Probs
parts.description: Initialize policy parameters, compute token logits, sequence log-probs, and their gradients w.r.t. the policy.

parts.title: Preference Data & Bradley–Terry
parts.description: Bradley–Terry pairwise loss, reward accuracy, and utilities to build and sample preference pairs.

parts.title: DPO Loss Formulation
parts.description: Frozen reference log-probs, policy–reference log-ratios, pair margins, the DPO objective, and its gradient.

parts.title: DPO Training Loop
parts.description: A single DPO train step and the outer training loop over preference batches.

parts.title: Variants, Implicit Rewards & Diagnostics
parts.description: Length-normalized log-probs, IPO loss, implicit rewards, preference accuracy, KL to reference, and reward-margin statistics.

parts.title: Evaluation & Full Pipeline
parts.description: Aggregate DPO evaluation metrics and wire everything into a complete train-and-evaluate pipeline.

title: RLHF from Scratch on DistilGPT2

parts.title: Model Setup and Decoding Strategies
parts.description: Load distilgpt2 and its tokenizer, sanity-check generation, and implement the core decoding primitives (greedy, temperature, top-k, top-p) used throughout the rest of the project.

parts.title: SFT Data Pipeline
parts.description: Construct a synthetic instruction dataset and build the formatting, tokenization, label masking, padding, batching, and train/val splitting utilities needed for supervised fine-tuning.

parts.title: SFT Training Loop
parts.description: Implement the optimization machinery for supervised fine-tuning: shifted next-token loss, AdamW, warmup, gradient clipping, accumulation, training and evaluation steps.

parts.title: LoRA Adapters
parts.description: Add low-rank adapters on top of distilgpt2 by implementing the LoRA delta, forward pass, initialization, parameter freezing, counting, and merge-back routines.

parts.title: Reward Modeling
parts.description: Build a synthetic preference dataset and train a reward head with pairwise losses, BCE alternatives, and pairwise accuracy diagnostics.

parts.title: PPO-Based RLHF
parts.description: Implement the PPO ingredients required to optimize the policy against the learned reward: log-probs, KL penalties, returns, GAE, clipped surrogates, value loss, and entropy bonus.

parts.title: Preference Optimization Alternatives
parts.description: Implement modern reference-based and reference-free preference losses including DPO, IPO, KTO, ORPO, and SimPO as drop-in replacements for the PPO pipeline.

parts.title: Evaluation and Chat Interface
parts.description: Generate completions on a held-out prompt set, score and compare models via win rate, and wrap everything in a streaming chat function with stop-token handling.

title: Vision-Language Model from Scratch in PyTorch

parts.title: Patch Embedding and ViT Input
parts.description: Turn a raw image tensor into a sequence of patch embeddings with a class token and learnable position embeddings.

parts.title: Multi-Head Self-Attention
parts.description: Implement scaled dot-product attention from primitives and assemble it into a full multi-head self-attention module.

parts.title: MLP, Normalization, and Encoder Blocks
parts.description: Build the position-wise MLP, layer normalization, pre-norm residual sublayers, and stack them into a vision encoder.

parts.title: Vision-to-Language Projector
parts.description: Extract patch features and project them into the language model's embedding dimension with a two-layer MLP.

parts.title: Text Embedding and Multimodal Fusion
parts.description: Build the tokenizer, embed text tokens, locate the image placeholder, and splice projected image tokens into the multimodal embedding sequence.

parts.title: Causal Decoder and Forward Pass
parts.description: Build the masked transformer decoder, language modeling head, and wire up the full vision-language model forward pass.

parts.title: Loss and Caption Generation
parts.description: Compute next-token cross-entropy loss with masking, then implement temperature, top-k, and sampling-based autoregressive generation.

parts.title: Training Loop
parts.description: Initialize parameters, run training steps with autograd, perform gradient descent updates, and execute a full training loop.

title: Flash Attention in CUDA from Scratch

parts.title: CUDA Primitives Warm-up
parts.description: Implement basic elementwise and reduction kernels that form the building blocks for matrix and attention operations.

parts.title: Matrix Operations
parts.description: Build the matmul, transpose, and dot-product utilities needed for attention scoring.

parts.title: Naive Attention Baseline
parts.description: Compose QK^T scoring, row-wise softmax, and PV multiplication into a straightforward attention pipeline.

parts.title: Online Softmax Math
parts.description: Implement the running-max and running-sum updates that allow softmax to be computed incrementally across tiles.

parts.title: Tiled Attention Building Blocks
parts.description: Write the per-tile shared-memory routines for loading, scoring, reducing, exponentiating, and accumulating PV.

parts.title: Fused Flash Attention Kernel
parts.description: Assemble the tiled blocks into the full Flash Attention kernel and its host launcher.

parts.title: Causal Flash Attention
parts.description: Extend the kernel with a causal mask for autoregressive attention.

title: Fused LLM Inference Kernels in CUDA

parts.title: Warp and Block Reductions
parts.description: Build fundamental warp-level and block-level sum/max reduction primitives used by later kernels.

parts.title: Residual and Activation Kernels
parts.description: Implement residual addition and common transformer activations: GELU, SiLU, and SwiGLU.

parts.title: Normalization Kernels
parts.description: Write RMSNorm, LayerNorm, and a fused residual-plus-RMSNorm kernel for pre-norm blocks.

parts.title: Softmax Kernels
parts.description: Implement row-wise and causal softmax for attention score normalization.

parts.title: Embeddings and RoPE
parts.description: Build token embedding lookup and rotary positional embedding (RoPE) kernels.

parts.title: Linear Layers and Fused MLP Ops
parts.description: Implement dense linear layers, fused linear+bias+GELU, and a full SwiGLU MLP forward.

parts.title: Composite Transformer Blocks
parts.description: Compose RMSNorm-residual blocks and an end-to-end transformer FFN path for fused inference.

title: Build a Mini LLM Inference Server

parts.title: Sampling Primitives
parts.description: Implement the decoding-time math: stable softmax, temperature scaling, top-k/top-p filters, and stochastic vs greedy token selection.

parts.title: Tokenization
parts.description: Build a tiny vocabulary plus encode/decode utilities to move between strings and token id sequences.

parts.title: Tiny Transformer with KV Cache
parts.description: Implement embeddings, linear projections, a basic KV cache, causal attention, and the prefill/decode forward passes.

parts.title: Paged KV Cache
parts.description: Design a block-based KV allocator with allocation/free, paged appends, gather, paged attention, and usage accounting.

parts.title: Sequences and Static Batching
parts.description: Model per-request sequence state, drive single-sequence generation, then batch multiple sequences through synchronized decode steps.

parts.title: Continuous Batching and Scheduling
parts.description: Add capacity checks, priority queues, admission, preemption, and a scheduler that mixes prefill and decode across in-flight requests.

parts.title: Serving API
parts.description: Expose a request/response interface with streaming chunks, submission, a driver loop, output collection, and completion responses.

parts.title: Benchmarking
parts.description: Measure TTFT, inter-token latency, throughput, and latency percentiles with an end-to-end benchmark runner.

title: VeriLLM: Publicly Verifiable Decentralized LLM Inference from Scratch in PyTorch

parts.title: Tokenizer
parts.description: Build a character-level vocabulary and encode/decode strings to and from token ids.

parts.title: Embeddings and Causal Self-Attention with KV Cache
parts.description: Implement token and positional embeddings, the linear projection primitive, and a single-head causal self-attention module that reads and writes a KV cache.

parts.title: Feed-Forward, LayerNorm, and Transformer Block
parts.description: Assemble the position-wise feed-forward network, layer normalization, residual add-and-norm sublayer, and the full transformer block that updates the KV cache.

parts.title: LM Head, Prefill, and Autoregressive Decoding
parts.description: Project hidden states to vocabulary logits, run prefill over a prompt, and generate tokens one decode step at a time while recording per-step state.

parts.title: Merkle Commitments over Decode Steps
parts.description: Hash tensors and decode-step states into leaves and build a Merkle tree with inclusion-proof generation and verification.

parts.title: Prover Transcript and Spot-Check Verification
parts.description: Run the prover to produce outputs and commitments, assemble the public transcript, and implement seeded spot-check verification that re-executes audited decode steps.

parts.title: Tampering, Detection Probability, and Verifier Cost
parts.description: Tamper with transcripts, derive the detection probability under k audits and a corruption fraction, and quantify verifier cost as a fraction of full re-execution.

parts.title: Decentralized Committee, Incentives, and End-to-End Evaluation
parts.description: Sample verifier committees, aggregate votes by majority, implement rewards and slashing, and run honest and malicious rounds reporting end-to-end verification cost.

title: Build an MLP in JAX from Scratch

parts.title: PRNG & Random Sampling
parts.description: Set up JAX's functional PRNG: wrap seeds, split keys, and sample random tensors.

parts.title: Synthetic Data & Labels
parts.description: Generate input features, assign deterministic class labels, and one-hot encode targets.

parts.title: Parameter Initialization
parts.description: Initialize a single linear layer and extend to a full MLP parameter list.

parts.title: Forward Pass Building Blocks
parts.description: Implement the linear layer, ReLU, softmax, and the full MLP forward pass.

parts.title: Loss & Metrics
parts.description: Compute log-softmax, mean cross-entropy loss, and classification accuracy.

parts.title: Autodiff & SGD Update
parts.description: Wrap the loss for autodiff, take gradients with jax.grad, and apply SGD updates.

parts.title: Training Loop & Inference
parts.description: Combine the pieces into a training step, an epoch loop, and a prediction function.

title: Build Your Own teenygrad: A Tiny Tensor Autograd Engine

parts.title: Shape Utilities
parts.description: Implement the small helper functions for working with shape tuples and index ordering that the rest of the engine relies on.

parts.title: The Lazy Buffer Backend
parts.description: Build the numpy-backed LazyBuffer with constant and random initialization plus elementwise, reduce, and movement operations.

parts.title: Autograd Functions
parts.description: Define the differentiable Function base class and implement forward and backward passes for all unary, binary, reduce, and movement operations.

parts.title: The Tensor API
parts.description: Create the Tensor wrapper, creation helpers, topological backward pass, and method bindings for every supported operation.

parts.title: Functional and Composite Ops
parts.description: Compose primitives into higher-level operations like mean, matmul, softmax, log_softmax, and cross entropy.

parts.title: Neural Network Modules and Optimizer
parts.description: Implement Linear layers, an MLP, and the SGD optimizer with gradient zeroing.

parts.title: Training and Evaluation
parts.description: Generate a toy dataset, train the MLP end to end, and evaluate its accuracy on a held-out split.

title: Federated Averaging (FedAvg) from Scratch in PyTorch

parts.title: Model and Dataset Setup
parts.description: Define the MLP classifier, build a synthetic labeled dataset, and split it into train and test sets.

parts.title: Client Data Partitioning
parts.description: Distribute the training data across clients using IID and non-IID strategies and report per-client sample counts.

parts.title: Local Client Training
parts.description: Iterate over a client's batches and run forward, loss, backward, and optimizer steps to train locally for several epochs.

parts.title: Parameter Utilities and Aggregation
parts.description: Clone, load, initialize, add, and scale model state dicts to build the sample-weighted FedAvg aggregation.

parts.title: Communication Rounds and FedAvg Loop
parts.description: Select participating clients, run a full communication round, evaluate accuracy, and drive the multi-round FedAvg training loop.

parts.title: Experiments and Analysis
parts.description: Compare against a centralized baseline and study IID vs non-IID gaps, the effect of local epochs, and the impact of client fraction.

title: DiLoCo: Distributed Low-Communication Training of Language Models

parts.title: Model, Forward & Loss
parts.description: Initialize parameters and implement the forward pass, activations, softmax, cross-entropy loss, and backprop that every worker will run locally.

parts.title: Inner Optimizer: AdamW
parts.description: Build the per-worker AdamW optimizer: state init, moment updates, bias correction, the parameter step, and decoupled weight decay.

parts.title: Parameter Arithmetic Utilities
parts.description: Implement the pytree-style parameter operations (clone, scale, subtract, average) that DiLoCo uses to compute pseudo-gradients and merge worker replicas.

parts.title: Data Sharding & Local Worker Training
parts.description: Partition the dataset across workers (IID and non-IID), sample per-worker batches, and run local training steps that emulate a single DiLoCo inner worker.

parts.title: Outer Optimizer with Nesterov Momentum
parts.description: Implement the server-side outer optimizer: state init, momentum buffer updates, Nesterov parameter updates, and computing the outer pseudo-gradient from worker deltas.

parts.title: DiLoCo Training Loop & Baseline
parts.description: Compose everything into a full DiLoCo communication round, the outer training loop across rounds, and a synchronous SGD baseline for comparison.

parts.title: Evaluation & Communication Analysis
parts.description: Measure held-out loss, classification accuracy, and quantify DiLoCo's communication savings versus the synchronous baseline.

title: Mini Distributed Training and Memory-Constrained Trainer from Scratch in NumPy

parts.title: MLP Forward and Backward Core
parts.description: Set up data and parameters, then implement the forward pass, loss, and manual backprop for a two-layer MLP.

parts.title: Gradient Accumulation
parts.description: Split batches into micro batches and accumulate gradients to emulate a large batch step under a tight memory budget.

parts.title: Activation Checkpointing
parts.description: Trade compute for memory by recomputing activations during backward and verify correctness and savings.

parts.title: Mixed Precision Training
parts.description: Run forward and backward in half precision while keeping a full precision master copy of the weights, with loss scaling and non-finite detection.

parts.title: Data Parallel Training
parts.description: Shard data across workers, compute local gradients, and synchronize them with all-reduce, including a ring all-reduce and bucketed communication.

parts.title: ZeRO-Style Optimizer Sharding
parts.description: Partition Adam optimizer state and parameter updates across workers, then all-gather to reconstruct the full model.

parts.title: Memory Accounting and Full Training Loop
parts.description: Quantify model, optimizer, and activation memory, compare with and without optimizations, and run the end-to-end distributed memory-aware training loop.

title: Trainable Mixture of Experts in CUDA

parts.title: CUDA Building Blocks
parts.description: Implement the core CUDA primitives used everywhere in the layer: matmul variants, bias add and reduction, elementwise ops, activations, and row-wise softmax with their backward passes.

parts.title: Top-K Gating Utilities
parts.description: Implement reusable kernels for selecting the top-k gate values per token and normalizing those gates to a probability distribution, including the backward through that normalization.

parts.title: Router
parts.description: Build the router that maps tokens to experts: compute logits via a gate matmul, turn them into probabilities, pick the top-k experts per token, and propagate gradients back to the gate weights.

parts.title: Token Dispatch and Combine
parts.description: Implement the sparse plumbing of MoE: counting tokens per expert, computing slot offsets, gathering tokens into per-expert buffers, scattering gradients back, and combining expert outputs weighted by gate values (with backward).

parts.title: Expert MLP Forward and Backward
parts.description: Implement the two-layer expert MLP that runs on each expert's slice of tokens, including up/down projections, biases, activation, and the full set of backward kernels for inputs, weights, and biases.

parts.title: Load Balancing Auxiliary Loss
parts.description: Implement the MoE load-balancing auxiliary loss: dispatch fractions, mean router probabilities, the aux loss itself, and the gradient back to router probabilities.

parts.title: Loss, Optimizer, and Training Loop
parts.description: Add the task loss (MSE), gradient-zeroing and SGD update kernels, and host-side orchestration for the full forward pass, backward pass, single training step, and overall training loop.

title: Multimodal Autoregressive Image Generator from Scratch in JAX

parts.title: Toy Multimodal Dataset
parts.description: Generate tiny grayscale images and pair each with a text label to form the multimodal training data.

parts.title: Patch Encoder and Decoder
parts.description: Normalize images, split them into patches, and build the linear encoder/decoder that maps patches to latent vectors and back.

parts.title: Vector Quantization and VQ-VAE Training
parts.description: Create the codebook, quantize latents with nearest-neighbor lookup and the straight-through estimator, assemble the VQ-VAE losses, train it, and tokenize images.

parts.title: Multimodal Sequences and Embeddings
parts.description: Build a character vocabulary, encode labels, prepend text tokens to image tokens, and add token plus positional embeddings.

parts.title: Transformer Backbone
parts.description: Implement causal masking, layer norm, multi-head self-attention, the feed-forward MLP, the stacked blocks, and the output logit projection.

parts.title: Transformer Training
parts.description: Compute the next-token cross entropy over image positions and apply optax updates to the transformer parameters.

parts.title: Guided Sampling and Generation
parts.description: Add classifier-free guidance dropout, combine conditional and unconditional logits, apply temperature and top-k sampling, and autoregressively decode tokens into an image.

parts.title: Evaluation and End-to-End Pipeline
parts.description: Measure accuracy, reconstruction error, and generation quality, then run the full VQ-VAE and transformer training and end-to-end conditional generation.

title: LoRA Fine-Tune a Tiny Chat Model with Unsloth

parts.title: Load the Quantized Base Model
parts.description: Load the 4-bit Qwen2.5 model and tokenizer, inspect parameter count, verify quantization, and fix the pad token.

parts.title: Attach LoRA Adapters
parts.description: Select attention target modules, wrap the model with LoRA, and measure how many parameters become trainable.

parts.title: Build the Instruction Dataset
parts.description: Create example instruction/response pairs, format them into training strings, build a Dataset, and sanity-check tokenization.

parts.title: Run the SFT Training Loop
parts.description: Configure TrainingArguments, construct an SFTTrainer, and run a few optimization steps to get a training loss.

parts.title: Inference with the Tuned Model
parts.description: Switch the model to inference mode, build a chat-template prompt, and generate and decode a reply.

title: A/B Testing & Causal Inference Toolkit

parts.title: Normal Distribution Primitives
parts.description: Implement the standard normal CDF and its inverse used throughout hypothesis testing and confidence intervals.

parts.title: Two-Proportion Hypothesis Testing
parts.description: Compute pooled and unpooled standard errors, the z-statistic, p-values, and confidence intervals for comparing two proportions.

parts.title: Experiment Design: Power & Sample Size
parts.description: Determine required per-variant sample size and evaluate statistical power for planned experiments.

parts.title: Sample Ratio Mismatch Diagnostics
parts.description: Use a chi-square check to detect broken randomization or traffic allocation bugs.

parts.title: Multiple Testing Corrections
parts.description: Apply Bonferroni and Benjamini-Hochberg procedures to control error rates across many hypotheses.

parts.title: Difference-in-Differences Estimation
parts.description: Estimate treatment effects from pre/post outcomes via simple differences and an OLS regression with an interaction term.

parts.title: Synthetic Control Method
parts.description: Fit non-negative donor weights to build a synthetic counterfactual and read off the post-period treatment effect.

parts.title: Ship Decision Logic
parts.description: Combine the primary metric outcome with guardrail metrics into a final ship/no-ship decision.

title: Market-Making & Betting-Game Simulator

parts.title: Expected Value & Betting Games
parts.description: Warm up with expected-value computations and optimal stopping rules on dice and card-draw games that mirror the decision logic used later in quoting.

parts.title: Core Market-Making Mechanics
parts.description: Implement the basic quoting loop: turn a fair value into a bid/ask, execute counterparty trades, and mark cash and inventory to market for P&L.

parts.title: Risk-Aware Quoting & Belief Updates
parts.description: Extend the quoter to account for adverse selection, uncertainty, and inventory skew, and update fair-value estimates from observed trades and revealed cards.

parts.title: Episode Simulation & Evaluation
parts.description: Tie everything together by running full market-making episodes and aggregating P&L statistics across many simulated runs.

title: Reinforcement Learning for Tic-Tac-Toe: From Minimax to DQN

parts.title: Board Representation & Game Engine
parts.description: Encode the 3x3 board, implement move legality, win/draw detection, turn tracking, and wrap everything into a reusable Game class with hard-coded and interactive play.

parts.title: Random and Minimax Baselines
parts.description: Implement a random-move agent, run head-to-head rollouts, then build a full minimax (with alpha-beta pruning) and verify optimal play against random and itself.

parts.title: Tabular Q-Learning Foundations
parts.description: Design state hashing with symmetry canonicalization, hyperparameters, epsilon-greedy action selection over legal moves, reward shaping, and the full Q-learning update and episode loop with learning curves.

parts.title: Self-Play, Evaluation & Persistence
parts.description: Train the Q-agent through self-play with perspective flipping, evaluate against random and minimax opponents, support human-vs-agent play, and save/load the Q-table.

parts.title: Deep Q-Network Agent
parts.description: Move from a table to a neural function approximator: encode the board for an MLP, mask illegal actions, build a replay buffer and target network, train DQN end-to-end, and compare against earlier agents.

parts.title: Policy Gradients & Extensions
parts.description: Implement a SARSA variant, a REINFORCE policy-gradient learner, compare value-based vs policy-based methods, and accelerate learning via 8-fold symmetry data augmentation.
